name: Invoiced
description: Invoiced — Accounts receivable and billing automation platform with auto-billing, customer portal, and payment plan management.

seo.title: Invoiced — Invoicing / Taxes / Sales Tax
seo.meta_description: Invoiced: Invoiced — Accounts receivable and billing automation platform with auto-billing, customer portal, and payment plan management.

when_to_use: Automated invoice delivery, reminders, and AR collection for B2B SaaS
Self-service customer payment portal for invoice-based B2B businesses
Payment plan management and installment billing for enterprise AR
Auto-billing and recurring invoice generation with accounting system sync

pros: Customer portal, auto-billing and dunning in one
API and webhooks for custom workflows
cons: Feels narrower than full billing platforms like Stripe
UI evolves slowly vs newer entrants
Complex tax scenarios require external tools
Pricing less transparent at higher tiers
review.verdict: Decent AR and billing automation for B2B SMBs — capable, but faces pressure from broader billing suites.
review.best_for: B2B SMBs with recurring invoices wanting a customer portal plus automated collections.
review.not_for: Teams needing deep global tax, complex pricing or usage-based billing natively.
